creator: rhurlin@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi Sergey,

I just tried audio/libsndfile on Poudriere 12.2 amd64 (r367125) and it builds fine for me.

Do you have any 'special' entries in Poudriere's make.conf?

Another, but unlikely possibility is a broken distfile. In this case, make distclean and make fetch should allow for subsequent patching.
